title: azalea minor
intro: Azalea minor, also known as the sweet azalea or mountain azalea, is a deciduous shrub native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, with its roots and flowers possessing medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Azalea minor include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and provide relief from rheumatism and digestive issues. Azalea minor can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in traditional folk medicine and modern herbal remedies.
